bio: Hey, I’m Christian, a creative designer immersed in the sports world. My experiences as a hockey player and referee has shaped my creative approach to visual storytelling; bringing a bold perspective to your ideas. Recently, I've been focusing on bringing unique experiences to social media through motion design and athlete composition.

Currently, I'm creating content for professional athlete MacKonner Dy and the BCHL officiating team. Through my work, I've helped brands grow to reach larger audiences, increase engagement, and achieve a better user experience.
